fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the current contour from <paramref name="start" /> to <paramref name="stop" /> into the specified path builder.

params.start: The distance along the path at which to begin the segment.
params.stop: The distance along the path at which to end the segment.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the extracted segment.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to prepend a move-to at the segment start; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
